# opnsense_quagga_ospf6_route_map (Data Source)

Configure OSPFv3 route maps.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `action` (String) Set permit for match or deny to negate the rule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this route map.
- `name` (String) The name of this route map.
- `prefix_list` (String) UUID of the prefix list to match.
- `route_map_id` (String) The route map ID (sequence number).
- `set` (String) Free text field for set commands.
